message.content:
@startuml
title AudioFileHeader_accessory

participant AudioFileHeader
participant AudioFileHeader_accessory
participant AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter

AudioFileHeader -> AudioFileHeader_accessory : 1 audio id
AudioFileHeader_accessory -> AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter : 2 audio id

AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter -> AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter : 3 edit sample and delete sample\ndialogs as render functions

opt [if route is "Quick Save"]
  AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter -> AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter : 4 assign sample dialog as render functions
end

AudioFileHeader_accessory_Presenter -> AudioFileHeader_accessory : 5 list of render functions

AudioFileHeader_accessory -> AudioFileHeader_accessory : render drop-down menu\n6 and dialog render functions\nin render()

@enduml
